docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIASTONE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIASTONE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RITZ JEWELERS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,096.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DIASTONE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RITZ JEWELERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION BEFORE HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF FILED BY DIASTONE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SHAMI SHAH--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RITZ JEWELERS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 46.00 - SERVED OCT-26-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RITZ JEWELERS
